CustomField.formula: CASE( TEXT(SubType__c), "ManagementCompany", 1, "Delegated_Investment_Managers", 2, "FundAdvisor", 3, "FundAdmin", 4, "Custodian", 5, "Central_Admins", 6, "Pre_CentralAdmin", 7, "Prime_Agent", 8, "TransferAgent", 9, "FundAuditor", 10, 99 /* défaut si aucune correspondance */ )
CustomField.label: Display Order
